subject: [PATCH 3/8 RFC] mm/page_counter: use page_counter_stock in page_counter_uncharge

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch modifies the page_counter_uncharge function to take into account the stock-awareness of page counters. It first checks if depositing the charge to the stock would put it over the batch limit, and if not, it deposits the charge immediately. If the stock is exceeded, it walks up the page counter hierarchy and uncharges the excess. This change preserves the existing semantics of the stock handling logic in try_charge_memcg. The repeated work of hierarchically cancelling page_counter charges is also extracted into a helper function.
